_doc: Trace A — initial idempotency-key incident triage. Replay fixture for DEMO_MODE=replay; the agent loop in lib/agent/loop.ts (Backend Engineer's lane) reads input_trace_pattern to match an incoming paste-trace, then surfaces tool_calls in order and returns `result`.

memories.text: Stripe webhook flaking, investigating duplicate charge events from cus_** — looks like the retry path hits processCharge twice when our 200 ack is slow.

Postmortem 2024-01-14 — Stripe webhook regression. Root cause: handler does not check idempotency on retried webhook deliveries. Action items: (1) wire lib/idempotency.ts into webhooks/stripe.ts retry branch, (2) ADR-007 governs key format.

ADR-007 — Idempotency keys for Stripe webhooks. We standardize on `${event.id}:${event.type}` as the key; lib/idempotency.ts.has() must be called before any side-effecting processCharge/processRefund.

snippets.content: Every Stripe webhook handler MUST consult a persistent idempotency check on event.id before performing any side effect, on every code path including retry paths.

recent_commits.author: eng-lead
recent_commits.message: fix(stripe): add retry handling to processWebhook (does NOT add idempotency check — see follow-up)

recent_commits.author: oncall
recent_commits.message: WIP: retry budget for stripe webhook (REVERTED)

timeline.event: Sentry alert fired: duplicate charge processed for cus_abc123 (event a3f8e9c1)
Prior incident: similar duplicate-charge pattern surfaced in #incidents (mem_slk_jan14_thread_001)
Postmortem 2024-01-14 noted idempotency gap; remediation deferred

root_cause.text: Idempotency check missing in webhooks/stripe.ts retry path. processCharge runs unconditionally when event.retry is true, so duplicate webhook deliveries process the charge twice. The lib/idempotency.ts helper exists per ADR-007 but is not wired into this branch — same pattern called out in the 2024-01-14 postmortem.

citations.excerpt: Postmortem 2024-01-14 — Stripe webhook regression. Root cause: handler does not check idempotency on retried webhook deliveries.
ADR-007 — Idempotency keys for Stripe webhooks. lib/idempotency.ts.has() must be called before any side-effecting processCharge/processRefund.
async has(key: string): Promise<boolean> { const { rows } = await db.query("select 1 from webhook_events where event_id = $1 limit 1", [key]); return rows.length > 0; }
Every Stripe webhook handler MUST consult a persistent idempotency check on event.id before performing any side effect, on every code path including retry paths.

similar_incidents.summary: Jan 14 — duplicate charge events in #incidents thread; same root cause class.
Jan 14 postmortem — Stripe webhook regression. Idempotency gap, remediation deferred.
ADR-007 — governs idempotency-key format; not enforced in stripe.ts retry path.
